description: This is the interface description of @API.
title: API Document

@API.element.description:
Specifies the release state of an element which is part of an API.

> ⚠️ **Deprecated since 1.2.5** — prefer `@API.element.releaseState`, `@API.element.successor`, `@API.element.decommissioningPlannedForYearMonth`.

successor.description: Defines the name of a released successor element/association which replaces an element/association with release state #DEPRECATED or #DECOMMISSIONED.

decommissioningPlannedForYearMonth.description: The annotation describes the planned decommissioning date of the annotated element. Use ISO format for YearMonth: YYYY-MM (e.g. 2024-08)

@API.element.x-deprecation-text: The grouped-object form is retained for backward compatibility. New adopters should prefer the individual full-path annotations `@API.element.releaseState`, `@API.element.successor`, and `@API.element.decommissioningPlannedForYearMonth`.
@API.element.title: @API.element

@API.element.decommissioningPlannedForYe.description: The annotation describes the planned decommissioning date of the annotated element. Use ISO format for YearMonth: YYYY-MM (e.g. 2024-08)
@API.element.decommissioningPlannedForYe.title: @API.element.decommissioningPlannedForYearMonth

@API.element.successor.description: Defines the name of a released successor element/association which replaces an element/association with release state #DEPRECATED or #DECOMMISSIONED.
@API.element.successor.title: @API.element.successor

@API.element.releaseState.description: The annotation describes the release state of the annotated element.

#.description: Provide the value in `{ "#": "<value>" }` enum notation.

oneOf.description:
Formerly released element/association is not to be used anymore.
At runtime, the element/association must work as before.
Together with this value a successors of the element/association should be defined using annotation @API.element.successor.

Formerly released element/association not to be used anymore.
At runtime, the element/association returns null values.
Together with this value a successors of the element/association should be defined using annotation @API.element.successor.

@API.element.releaseState.title: @API.element.releaseState

@API.entity.decommissioningPlannedForYea.description: The annotation describes the planned decommissioning date of the annotated entity. Use ISO format for YearMonth: YYYY-MM (e.g. 2024-08)
@API.entity.decommissioningPlannedForYea.title: @API.entity.decommissioningPlannedForYearMonth

@API.entity.successor.description: Defines the name of a released successor entity which replaces an entity with release state #DEPRECATED or #DECOMMISSIONED.
@API.entity.successor.title: @API.entity.successor

@API.entity.releaseState.description: The annotation describes the release state of the annotated entity.

#.description: Provide the value in `{ "#": "<value>" }` enum notation.

oneOf.description:
Formerly released entity is not to be used anymore.
At runtime, the entity must work as before.
Together with this value a successors of the entity should be defined using annotation @API.entity.successor.

Formerly released entity not to be used anymore.
At runtime, the entity returns null values.
Together with this value a successors of the entity should be defined using annotation @API.entity.successor.

@API.entity.releaseState.title: @API.entity.releaseState
